title: React Front-to-Back: Modern Web Development
subtitle: Master React 18, React Router v6, Hooks, Context API, and state management by building real-world projects.
description: This course is the ultimate guide to mastering React from absolute scratch. You will learn modern concepts including Hooks, Context API, state management, and performance tools. By the end of this course, you will have built several real-world projects, including a dynamic dashboard and a fully functional e-commerce frontend. We focus on clean code and production-level architectures, avoiding unnecessary complexities and focusing on practical skills that employers look for.
learningOutcomes: Build modern, fast, responsive React applications from scratch
Understand the mechanics of React 18 rendering, fiber, and concurrent features
Master routing using React Router v6 and implement complex layouts
Manage clean global state using context and state composition
Write clean, maintainable code using best practices and folder organization
requirements: Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and modern JavaScript (ES6+)
A computer with Node.js and a code editor (like VS Code) installed

lessons.title: Your First React App in 5 Minutes

reviews.comment: Outstanding course! Sarah has a gift for breaking down complex React concepts. The practical projects really solidified my understanding.
Very thorough content. I appreciated the emphasis on modern React 18 features and React Router v6. Wish there were a few more quizzes, but overall amazing.

title: Financial Modeling for Founders & Startup Investors
subtitle: Learn spreadsheet modeling, projections, SaaS metrics, cap tables, valuation techniques, and unit economics.
description: Learn the business planning skills used by top startup founders and VC analysts. Build interactive revenue models, cost forecasts, cap tables, and perform discounted cash flow valuations from scratch using Google Sheets or Excel.
learningOutcomes: Build a complete 3-statement financial model for SaaS and Transactional businesses
Analyze unit economics including CAC, LTV, Churn, and Payback Period
Model equity dilution, seed rounds, and construct startup cap tables
Determine business value using multiple valuation methodologies
requirements: Basic familiarity with Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel

title: Advanced SEO Masterclass: Drive 1M+ Monthly Traffic
subtitle: Master technical SEO, on-page optimization, content strategy, link building, and keyword research.
description: Unlock search engine traffic at scale. This course takes you past standard meta tags into advanced programmatic SEO, indexation mechanics, backlink sourcing networks, and conversion rate optimization (CRO) strategies.
learningOutcomes: Execute high-impact keyword research using professional SEO suites
Diagnose and resolve crawl budget and technical indexation issues
Design and automate authority link building campaigns that get links
Optimize local SEO signals and Google Business profiles
requirements: Access to an active website or blog (WordPress, React, etc.) is recommended
Basic understanding of Google Search Console

lessons.title: How Search Engines Index Modern Web Apps

title: Mastering Portrait Photography & Studio Lighting
subtitle: Understand manual camera settings, natural lighting, studio strobe equipment, and portrait retouching.
description: Learn to capture striking, professional portraits in any environment. Get a complete breakdown of manual camera settings, lens choices, color theory, flash techniques, and Lightroom post-processing workflow.
learningOutcomes: Master manual exposure settings (ISO, Aperture, Shutter Speed)
Sculpt subject features using single and multi-light studio setups
Pose corporate and casual clients comfortably for dynamic compositions
Retouch portraits professionally in Adobe Lightroom and Photoshop
requirements: A DSLR or Mirrorless camera with manual settings capability
Prime lens (50mm or 85mm) is highly recommended but not required

title: High-Performance Leadership & Team Dynamics
subtitle: Develop emotional intelligence, master critical feedback conversations, delegate, and build high-performance cultures.
description: Move from an individual contributor to an inspiring leader. This course provides immediately actionable frameworks for management, active listening, delegation, and coaching remote or hybrid engineering and product teams.
learningOutcomes: Apply situational leadership models to guide diverse teams
Handle high-stakes performance feedback and conflict resolution
Create high psychological safety metrics inside your organization
Delegate tasks effectively using accountability metrics
requirements: Desire to build better interpersonal skills
Current or aspiring leadership, management, or PM role

title: Next.js Production Architecture & Server Actions
subtitle: Learn App Router, Server Components, caching strategies, SEO optimization, and secure databases.
description: Build high-performance web applications using the latest Next.js features. Discover optimization paradigms, hybrid rendering routes, edge databases, secure server actions, and deploy globally.
learningOutcomes: Master Server Components and Client Components optimization trade-offs
Secure Server Actions and validate payloads using Zod schemas
Configure static, dynamic, and incremental regeneration (ISR)
Set up responsive layout structures with full middleware checks
requirements: Strong proficiency in React and modern JavaScript

title: Design Systems with Figma: Scale Your UI
subtitle: Build highly flexible components, variables, tokens, and multi-platform library files in Figma.
description: Stop designing custom buttons for every new page. Learn how to architect, organize, and maintain standard UI token libraries, color tokens, semantic variables, and component sets in Figma.
learningOutcomes: Set up robust design tokens for spacing, typography, and color variables
Design flexible component sets with full properties, boolean states, and slots
Manage design-to-development handoffs with clean code-mapped definitions
requirements: Completed standard Figma bootcamp or possesses solid layout skills

lessons.title: Setting Up Brand Variables in Figma

title: Startup Valuation & Pitching for Venture Capital
subtitle: Structure seed terms sheets, calculate premoney valuations, and build pitch decks that win rounds.
description: Learn what venture capital firms look for. Master the methods of valuation, financial modeling pitches, seed terminology, options pools, liquidation preferences, and cap structures.
learningOutcomes: Evaluate startups using Multiple-based and Scorecard methods
Draft, negotiate, and understand term sheets and SAFE notes
Build a clean 10-slide investor presentation deck
requirements: Basic understanding of startup operations and cap tables

lessons.title: What Investors Look For In Teams

title: Modern JavaScript: Deep Dive & Design Patterns
subtitle: Master closures, event loops, scopes, execution context, design patterns, and ESNext algorithms.
description: Get deep under the hood of standard JavaScript runtime. Learn compiler engines, memory leaks, prototypal inheritance, custom modules, singleton design patterns, and asynchronous generators.
learningOutcomes: Understand standard V8 compiler optimizations
Apply async patterns, generators, and custom workers
Build modular layouts using structural design patterns
requirements: Basic JavaScript syntax knowledge (variables, loops, conditions)

title: Psychology-Driven Web Design & Conversion
subtitle: Learn visual triggers, user decision mapping, typography hierarchies, and landing page wireframes.
description: Learn the psychological drivers that turn casual landing page visitors into paying customers. Implement color triggers, cognitive bias layouts, trust markers, and clean grid conversions.
learningOutcomes: Apply Hick's Law, Fitts's Law, and Gestalt principles to web design
Optimize checkout funnels and form fields to minimize dropout rates
Conduct scientific A/B tests to validate visual designs
requirements: Basic visual literacy, familiarity with web interface norms

title: Adobe Lightroom & Visual Storytelling
subtitle: Develop a consistent editing style, catalog thousands of images, and export print-ready photos.
description: A comprehensive walkthrough on Adobe Lightroom. Learn photo importing, rating workflows, color grading sliders, custom presets, tone curves, noise reductions, and raw adjustments.
learningOutcomes: Construct efficient Lightroom photo catalog strategies
Master Tone Curve, HSL, and Color Grading adjustments
Create custom presets to speed up commercial workflows
requirements: Adobe Lightroom (Classic or CC) active subscription or trial version

lessons.title: Lightroom CC vs Classic: Which to Use?
